The Problem Matrix

Why Template Websites Fail Scaling Businesses.

Basic setups crack under pressure. As your traffic grows, limitations quickly turn into lost revenue.

  • Limited ScalabilityInflexible architecture that cannot adapt to complex operational workflows or traffic spikes.
  • Slow PerformanceBloated plugins and poor databases that kill SEO rankings and user retention.
  • Poor Conversion StructureGeneric layouts that fail to guide users down strategic sales funnels.
  • No Advanced IntegrationsInability to sync natively with external CRMs, ERPs, or payment gateways.
  • Weak Backend SystemsUnstable foundation lacking enterprise-grade security and custom logic.

Framework Comparison

Basic CMS

SpeedAvg 3-5s
SecurityVulnerable
ScaleCapped
UI/UXTemplate

Advanced System

SpeedSub-Second
SecurityBank-Grade
ScaleInfinite
UI/UXCustom Built
The Preet Tech Standard

Engineered for Dominance.

Custom Framework

Zero templates. Built-from-scratch ecosystems utilizing React, Next.js, and Node.js for absolute control.

Scalable Backend Systems

Serverless architectures and robust microservices designed to handle extreme data loads seamlessly.

Conversion-Focused Design

Neurological UI principles that map to user intent, converting passing traffic into retained revenue.

Enterprise-Level Security

Multi-layered encryption, SSL hardening, and active firewall nodes shielding your core data.

High-Speed Optimization

Aggressive CDN caching and code splitting to guarantee near-instantaneous global load times.

Long-Term Technical Support

Continuous engineering protocols. We monitor, maintain, and upgrade your system post-launch.

Target Audiences

Built for Scaling Ventures.

SaaS Startups

Software platforms needing robust logic.

E-Commerce Brands

High-volume retail relying on speed.

Real Estate Firms

Property databases with advanced search.

Education Platforms

LMS systems handling heavy video traffic.

Healthcare Systems

HIPAA compliant patient portal architectures.

Corporate Enterprises

Global conglomerates requiring extreme scale.

The Differentiator

Beyond Standard Web Design.

We don't just build websites. We engineer high-performance platforms designed to scale your business, optimize user journeys, and dominate your industry.

01

Custom Framework

No restrictive themes. Proprietary code designed exclusively for your workflows.

02

Merciless Optimization

Aggressive auditing and global CDNs guarantee sub-second load times.

03

Neurological UI/UX

Bespoke user journeys driven by cognitive principles to maximize conversions.

04

Headless Integration

Seamlessly couple with any API, CRM, or external tool natively.

05

Infinite Scalability

Microservices ensure your platform can handle explosive traffic spikes effortlessly.

Design Engineering

Neurological UI/UX Strategy.

Design isn't just aesthetics—it's directed geometry. We engineer interface pathways that subconsciously pull users toward conversion actions.

Web Platforms.

Custom E-Commerce
Engines.

Scaling beyond Shopify limits. We build headless Magento, Next.js Commerce, or fully custom transactional engines with zero-latency checkouts.

SaaS Web Apps

View Capabilities

CRM / ERP Systems

Internal tooling built specifically for your operational model and team productivity.

View Capabilities

Multi-Vendor Markets

Complex vendor splitting, logistics routing, and multi-channel management platforms.

Subscription Logic Engines

Recurring billing APIs, automated dunning, robust tax calculations, and gated access control systems flawlessly integrated into your product.

Connectivity Core

API & Backend Logic.

No application operates in isolation. We wire your platform into the global digital ecosystem via robust API orchestrations securely.

Payment Gateways

Stripe, Razorpay, PayPal integrations

CRM & ERP Sync

Salesforce, HubSpot bidirectional sync

Third-Party APIs

Twilio, Google, AWS services

Automation Systems

Zapier, Make, custom scripts

System Infrastructure Live
const PaymentPipeline = async (req) => {
try {
const { user, intent } = req.body;
 
// 1. Authenticate Request
await SecurityGuard.validate(user.token);
 
// 2. Cross-check ERP
const inventory = await ERP.checkStock();
 
// 3. Fire Payment API
const tx = await Stripe.charge(intent);
 
// 4. Update internal DB
await DB.orders.insert(tx.receipt);
 
return res.status(200).json({ success: true });
} catch (error) { ... }
}
98%Performance Score
LCP
0.8sLargest Content
CLS
0.02Layout Shift
Velocity Engine

Speed as a Feature.

Latency equals lost clients. We engineer systems that pass Google's Core Web Vitals natively, delivering lightning-fast rendering globally.

Optimized Codebase

Tree-shaken JS, minified CSS, and modern web architectures like Server-Side Rendering.

Lazy Loading & Next-Gen Formats

Images in WebP/AVIF loaded asynchronously to prioritize first paint.

Global CDN & Server Optimization

Deployments via Vercel Edge networks to put data physically closer to users.

Fortress Protocol

Impenetrable Security. Infinite Scale.

Data Encryption

AES-256 bit encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit.

Secure Auth

OAuth 2.0, JWT tokens, and biometric integration.

Cloud Infrastructure

Load-balanced clusters on AWS, GCP, or Vercel.

Scalable Scaling

Auto-scaling server setups for unlimited traffic.

We leverage bleeding-edge technologies to build scalable, secure, and blazing-fast web ecosystems.

Our Protocol

From Discovery to Launch.

A structured, transparent development process engineered for quality and speed.

01

Discovery

Deep-dive into your business model, goals, competitors, and target audience.

1-2 Days
02

Strategy

Technical architecture planning, tech stack selection, and conversion mapping.

2-3 Days
03

UI/UX Design

Wireframes, high-fidelity prototypes, and user journey optimization.

5-7 Days
04

Development

Full-stack coding with agile sprints, code reviews, and progress demos.

2-4 Weeks
05

QA & Testing

Cross-browser testing, performance audits, security scans, and UAT.

3-5 Days
06

Launch

Deployment to production, DNS setup, SSL certs, and monitoring activation.

1-2 Days
Post-Launch Care

Maintenance & Support.

Your website is a living asset. We ensure it stays optimized, secure, and ahead of the curve.

Essential

Core upkeep for smooth operation.

  • Monthly Security Updates
  • Uptime Monitoring
  • Bug Fixes (5hrs/mo)
  • Monthly Performance Report
  • Email Support
Get Started

Professional

Proactive maintenance for growing businesses.

  • Everything in Essential
  • Priority Bug Fixes (15hrs/mo)
  • Feature Enhancements
  • SEO Monitoring & Tweaks
  • Dedicated Slack Channel
  • 24/7 Emergency Support
Get Started

Enterprise

Full technical partnership for scaling brands.

  • Everything in Professional
  • Unlimited Dev Hours
  • Quarterly Strategy Reviews
  • Infrastructure Scaling
  • Custom Integrations
  • Dedicated Account Manager
Get Started
Investment Tiers

Transparent Pricing.

Every project is unique. Choose a tier that matches your scale, and we'll tailor the scope to your exact requirements.

Growth

₹1.5L - 3L

For startups and SMBs needing a custom, high-performance website.

3-4 Weeks
  • 5-10 Custom Pages
  • Responsive Design
  • Basic SEO Setup
  • CMS Integration
  • Contact Forms & CTAs
  • 30-Day Post-Launch Support
